title: 7th Vienna Workshop on High-Dimensional Times Series in Macroeconomics and Finance
content:
The “Seventh Vienna Workshop on High-Dimensional Times Series in Macroeconomics and Finance” was hosted on May 28 and 29, 2026 by the Institute for Advanced Studies Vienna.
The workshop was organized by Manfred Deistler (TU Wien), Leopold Sögner (Institute for Advanced Studies) and Martin Wagner (University of Klagenfurt)
Once again, excellent speakers could be won to hold the keynote lectures, namely Roberto Casarin (Ca’ Foscari University of Venice), Domenico Giannone (Johns Hopkins University), Serena Ng (Columbia University) und Melanie Schienle (Karlsruhe Institute of Technology).

The programme consisted of some 30 paper presentations – including one by Sebastian Veldhuis (EAOR/QED) – and two poster sessions. There was ample opportunity for the approx. 70 participants to discuss their research, exchange ideas and interact not only during the workshop at the Institute for Advanced Studies but also at the conference dinner and the farewell reception.
Follow the links to the Workshop and the Programme.
Der Beitrag 7th Vienna Workshop on High-Dimensional Times Series in Macroeconomics and Finance erschien zuerst auf University of Klagenfurt.
